arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel now questions what happened at Arsenal ahead of England vs Latvia
Morgan Gibbs-White included in England squad against Latvia
arts.sum: Morgan Gibbs-White has been included in the England matchday squad for tonight’s clash with Latvia. The Nottingham Forest midfielder was not part of the squad for Friday’s 2-0 win over Albania but is included ahead of tonight’s meeting with Latvia at Wembley. England take on Latvia as their 2026 World Cup qualification campaign continues. arts.ttl: England vs Latvia – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: England welcome Latvia to Wembley in 2026 World Cup qualification this evening for the first-ever meeting between the two nations. The Three Lions take on Latvia in the second fixture of Thomas Tuchel’s reign. The German’s tenure began with an important, if unconvincing, three points against Albania on Friday evening. Thomas Tuchel's England out to avoid unwanted 66-year first in Latvia World Cup 2026 qualifier
arts.sum: England will be aiming to avoid suffering an unwanted 66-year first when they square off with Latvia in Monday's World Cup 2026 qualifier at Wembley.

England kicked off the Thomas Tuchel era with a straightforward 2-0 home victory over Albania on Friday evening. Goals from debutant Myles Lewis-Skelly and captain Harry Kane sealed an opening win in...

arts.ttl: Livramento left out of England squad for Latvia match
arts.sum: Newcastle United defender Tino Livramento is left out of England's 23-man squad for the World Cup qualifier against Latvia.
